privileged_info_summary: The complete_todo_implementations task is a synthetic Java utility project created from scratch by setup_task.sh. The project is a Maven-based Java 17 application using JUnit 4.12 for testing. It contains two utility classes (StringUtils and MathUtils) with 6 TODO comments to implement. The test suite contains 7 test methods across two test classes (StringUtilsTest with 3 methods, MathUtilsTest with 4 methods), totaling 24 individual assertions. However, the task description claims 'All 18 tests must pass,' which contradicts the actual number of test methods (7) in the test files. The project directory is /home/ga/IdeaProjects/todo-utils, and all source and test files are created dynamically during task setup.
